verses.text: Tua ciangin Job in thu genkik a
“Keima dikna a hong seelcipsak Pasian, ka lungsim a hong gimsak Vanglian Pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin
ka sungah nuntakna a omlaiteng, Pasian' hu, ka nakah ka diik laiteng
ka muk tawh thusia peuhmah ka gen het kei ding a, ka kam tawh zuauthu peuhmah ka gen het kei ding hi, ci-in ka kiciam hi
Note a thuman hi, kong ci ngei kei ding a, ka nuntak laiteng, kei a thuman hi'ng, ka cihna thu ka khia ngei kei ding hi
Kei thuman ka kisakna ka khia ngei kei ding hi. Ka lungsimah kisuan'na omloin siang mahmah hi
“Kei a hong langpan', kei a hong dote in migilo leh thumanlote bangin gimna thuak ta uh hen
Pasian in amaute' nuntakna a laksak hun ciangin, migilote-a' dingin lametna om nawn ahi hiam
Lungkhamna a thuak uh ciangin Pasian in amau' kikona awging ngai ding ahi hiam
Pasian' piak ding lungdamna a deih ding uh kilawm ahih manin, ama tungah thu a nget tawntung ding uh a kilawm ahi hi
“Pasian' vangliatna bangzahin lian mahmah cih hong gensak un la, Vanglian Pasian' geelsa teng hong laktelsak dih un
Ahi zongin tuate khempeuh na theih khitsa uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin mawk pau na hi uh hiam
“Vanglian Pasian in migilote, mi ngongtatte, gim a piakzia hih bang ahi hi
Tapa tampi a neih hangun, a vekpi-in galsungah si mangkhin ding uh hi. A tate uh a tawntungin gilkial niloh ding uh hi
A nungta laisunte zong pulnatna tawh si ding uh a, meigong numeite in misite kahzo nawnlo ding uh hi
Migilote in kuama simzawhloh ngun tampi tak nei ding uh a, genzawh lohin nikten' puansilh ciang venvan ding uh hi
Ahi zongin mihoih pawlkhat in tua puante silhin, thuman mi pawlkhat in tua ngunte tang lel ding uh hi
Migilote' lam innte kholo a, maimom bu, ahih kei leh lo hon'na buk tawh kibang lel hi
Amaute a hausa-in lum uh a, ahih hangin a khan'lawh uh ciangin a hauhna teng uh na maimang ta hi
Lauhuaina in tuikhang pak bangin nawkgawp ding a, zan ciangin huihpi in amaute mutkhiamang ding hi
Nisuahna huihpi in amaute leen'khia-in a inn panun gamlapi-ah leen'khia ding hi
Amaute a suahtak theihna ding a hanciam tantan kimlai mah, hehpih ngaihsut hetloin leen'khiamang ding hi
Amaute a tai laitakun huih in nawk gawpin, a susiagawp dingin mutkhiagawp ding hi.
